title: Epic Loot fully heals equipped creature on equip

card.rawText: AL: +5. SPD: +5. Atk Dice Rolls: +1. Hit Dice Rolls: +1. On equip, fully heal the equipped creature.

plan.title: Epic Loot fully heals equipped creature on equip
plan.summary: Equip Epic Loot to a damaged creature and verify its current HP is restored to max HP once.

notes: Place test_creature_hp100 on player_1 field as primary.
Set current HP to 80 before equip.

steps: Player 1 plays Epic Loot and equips it to the damaged primary creature.
manualVerification: Confirm heal resolves only on equip and does not repeat every phase.
riskNotes: The setup needs a pre-damaged primary creature before equip resolves.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
